title: interaction-crafting
body:
# Interaction Crafting

This Minecraft datapack replaces the default and boring crafting table with a new interaction-based crafting system.

### Features

- Lightweight
- Supports all recipes (including modded)
- Supports custom data-driven NBT recipes (check [repo](https://github.com/zptr1/interaction-crafting) for guide on adding custom recipes)

### Installation

⚠️ Make sure you have experimental 1.21 features enabled!

### Showcase

![](https://i.imgur.com/Z6Zgu0O.gif)
